calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2014 Set For Trial On Jul-13-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Orer Transferring Venue To County Of Los Angeles Superior Court And For Order That Plaintiff Pay Deft'S Costs, Attorneys' Fees And Transfer Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $2,244.40 And Table Of Contents
Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS MEHRAN EBADOLAHI, SINA MOBASSER, BARMAX LLC AND TESTMAX, INC.'S Motion for Order Transferring Venue To County Of Los Angeles Superior Court And For Order That Plaintiff Pay Defendant'S Costs, Attorneys' Fees And Transfer Fees And Costs In The Amount Of $2,244.40 -
The court denies the motion to change venue. Defendants have the burden of negating the propriety of venue as laid on all possible grounds. See Karson Industries, Inc. v. Sup. Crt. (1969) 273 Cal.App.2d 7, 9. Defendants fail to maintain that burden. Defendant BarMax LLC is the entity that entered into the contracts with plaintiff. BarMax LLC is a properly named party and represented by counsel. Defendants fail to show how venue is improper as to BarMax LLC. Defendants may have shown that TestMax, Inc., Mr. Ebadolahi, and Mr. Mobasser reside in Los Angeles. "[S]o long as the plaintiff chooses a venue that is proper as to one defendant, the entire case may be tried there, regardless of whether venue would be improper with respect to other defendants if the causes of action against them were analyzed separately." K.R.L. Partnership v. Sup. Crt. (2004) 120 Cal.App.4th 490, 504. The court denies plaintiff's request for judicial notice dated November 4, 2014 of the website. See Jolley v. Chase Home Finance, LLC (2013) 213 Cal.App.4th 872, 889. The Court grants plaintiff's supplemental request filed on November 12, 2014. All parties' requests for fees and costs in connection with this motion are denied. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Dec-31-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Simon Lee, Esq., Tel. 510.220.3033, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as the ruling of the Court. DEFENDANTS MEHRAN EBADOLAHI, SINA MOBASSER, TESTMAX, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is granted. Plaintiff's counsel filed a declaration stating that it will not oppose the motion and will re-serve the Defendants. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
